meta.title: Parallly — Automate your WhatsApp sales with AI
meta.description: Conversational AI platform for sales. Automate WhatsApp, Instagram and Messenger. 24/7 AI agent, built-in CRM, no code.

hero.title: Your AI that answers WhatsApp and sells for you, 24/7
hero.subtitle: Your AI agent responds in seconds. Your team closes in minutes. All in one platform.

socialProof.trust: Over 500 companies across Latin America trust Parallly

problem.title: How many sales are you losing by not responding on time?
problem.subtitle: Every minute without a reply is a customer walking to your competitor.
problem.card1: Your customers message you on WhatsApp, Instagram and Messenger... and you reply hours later.
problem.card2: Every lead lives in a different chat. You don't know who's who or what you already told them.
problem.card3: You have no data. You don't know which channel sells more or how much each lead costs you.

demo.title: See it in action
demo.subtitle: Two real businesses. Two automated conversations. Zero human intervention.

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.subtitle: In 3 simple steps you're ready to sell more
howItWorks.step1Desc: WhatsApp, Instagram, Messenger. No code, in minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Upload your catalog, prices and FAQs. Give your virtual assistant a personality.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Your agent responds 24/7, qualifies leads and transfers to your team when needed.

features.title: Everything you need to sell more
features.subtitle: A complete platform to automate, manage and scale your messaging sales
features.f1Title: An AI agent that sounds like you
features.f1Desc: Set the tone, style and rules. Your AI responds as if it were you, but 24/7.
features.f2Title: All your chats in one place
features.f2Desc: WhatsApp, Instagram, Messenger, Telegram and SMS in a unified inbox. Never jump between apps again.
features.f3Desc: Every conversation automatically creates a lead. Pipeline, scoring, follow-ups... all automatic.
features.f4Desc: Business rules, nurturing, follow-ups... configure with clicks, not code.
features.f5Desc: Response time, conversion by channel, CSAT, agent performance. All in real time.
features.f6Desc: AES-256 encryption, per-tenant data isolation, granular roles. Your data and your customers' data are protected.
features.f7Desc: Your AI books appointments via chat. Public booking page, automatic reminders, no-show detection, recurring appointments.
features.f8Desc: Public help center for your customers. Searchable articles, categories, and AI-powered answers from your documentation.

testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.t1Quote: We used to take hours to reply on WhatsApp. Now the AI responds in 3 seconds. Sales went up 45% in the first month.
testimonials.t2Quote: We manage 15 clients with WhatsApp and Instagram. With Parallly everything arrives in one panel. My team stopped going crazy.
testimonials.t3Quote: WhatsApp orders are handled by the AI. My team focuses on cooking, not answering messages.

pricing.title: Plans that grow with you
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Scale when you need to.
pricing.freeTrial: 7 days free. No card. No fine print.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know to get started.
faq.q1: Do I need to know how to code?
faq.a1: Not at all. Everything is configured with clicks. If you know how to use WhatsApp, you know how to use Parallly.
faq.a2: You upload your info (catalog, FAQs, rules). The AI learns and responds as if it were you. We use advanced models like GPT-4 and Claude, trained with your business information.
faq.q3: What if the AI makes a mistake?
faq.a3: No worries. If the AI doesn't know what to say, it hands the conversation to your team instantly. Our smart handoff system sends all the context to your human agent so they don't have to start from scratch.
faq.q4: Does it integrate with my current system?
faq.a4: Yes. We have an open API and connect with the most popular CRMs. Parallly includes its own CRM, but also integrates with HubSpot, Salesforce and more via webhooks.
faq.a5: 100%. Military-grade encryption (AES-256-GCM), data isolated per company, daily backups. We comply with all regulations. Your data and your customers' data are never shared between tenants.
faq.q6: How long until it's up and running?
faq.a6: In 1 hour you'll have your AI agent responding. Seriously, 1 hour. Just connect your Meta account, upload your information and you're done.

cta.title: Ready to stop losing sales?
cta.subtitle: Start your free trial today. 7 days, no card, no commitment.
